contract_claim: resetAdapterRegistryMock only iterates top-level registry methods on the returned object literal. The nested IDebugAdapter mock returned by `create` (L49–124) contains dozens of vi.fn() spies that are completely unreachable by this reset helper.
observed_behavior: resetAdapterRegistryMock only iterates top-level registry methods on the returned object literal. The nested IDebugAdapter mock returned by `create` (L49–124) contains dozens of vi.fn() spies that are completely unreachable by this reset helper.
